headline: A Modern Home Built into an Arizona Mountainside Lists for $27.5 Million
summary: The roughly 14,200-square-foot house in Paradise Valley has views of boulders from many of its rooms.

headline: Microchip Technology, Monolithic Power Systems, onsemi, Vishay Intertechnology, and Amtech Shares Are Soaring, What You Need To Know
summary: A number of stocks jumped in the afternoon session after Nvidia announced a strategic partnership and a $2 billion investment in fellow chipmaker Marvell Technology.
